name: Nightsunder Grove (Eldritch Forest RPG)
description:
🗺️ Realm Name:
Nightsunder Grove
Also whispered as The Veilwood, Root of the Unseen, or The Breathing Wilds.

🌍 Realm Overview:
Nightsunder Grove is a forest shaped by cosmic forces that never meant to touch mortal soil. Trees shift when unobserved, shadows drip like ink, and the canopy sometimes parts to reveal stars that don’t belong to this world. It is a woodland where reality buckles under the presence of ancient, unfathomable beings.

🧭 Geography & Environment:

  • Terrain (mountains, oceans, forests, etc.):
    Vast labyrinthine forest, sinkholes with bioluminescent roots, impossible clearings that change shape nightly, fungal mesas, and ravine networks that echo with overlapping voices.

  • Climate & Weather:
    Perpetual twilight, temperature swings without pattern, sudden distortions of wind that move in spirals, and occasional “sky fractures” revealing alien constellations.

  • Natural Resources:
    Star-bloom fungi, ink-sap (shifts color when exposed to sound), resonance bark, and luminary spores treasured for scrying rites.

  • Major Landmarks or Regions:

    • The Rifted Canopy — a torn stretch of sky where foreign stars shine.

    • The Murmuring Hollows — caverns of echoing, half-formed speech.

    • The Weeping Orchard — trees that exude memory-laden resin.

    • The Spiral Clearing — a region where paths reorganize every dusk.

  • Map (optional):
    Available on request — though it will change.

👑 Factions & Power Structures:

  • Main Kingdoms/Empires/Tribes:

    • The Starward Order (scholars who study forest anomalies)

    • The Thornbound Clans (survivors adapted to shifting terrain)

    • The Luminar Chorus (cult devoted to extra-terrestrial entities)

    • The Rootwatch (hunters suppressing cosmic corruption)

  • Government Styles:
    Fragmented enclaves ruled by consensus, omen-readers, or warlords. Power is earned through knowledge of safe paths and negotiation with unseen intelligences.

  • Military Presence:
    Wardens with resonance-forged weapons, psychic sentinels trained to resist forest influence, and pathfinders fluent in tracking geometric distortions.

  • Religious or Cult Influence:
    Heavy — countless micro-cults worship star-things, root-whispers, or the forest’s metaphysical pulse. Orthodoxy doesn’t exist; revelation is inconsistent but dangerous.

  • Major Conflicts or Wars:

    • The Spore Rebellion (fungal entities attempting to overwrite mortal minds)

    • The Path Wars (factions fighting to control stable trails)

    • Ongoing conflict between the Rootwatch and cosmic cults

🧙 Magic & Technology:

  • Magic System (if any):
    Elderspire Artistry — magic born from resonance: harmonic chanting, geometric sigils, and controlled exposure to luminary spores.

  • Source of Magic or Power:

    • Starfalls that seed psychic anomalies

    • Root-echoes carrying faint cosmic memory

    • Ink-sap that reshapes perception

  • Technological Level:
    Early-medieval with arcane augmentations — tools inscribed with geometry runes, lanterns that sense distortion, and armor reinforced with resonance-bark.

  • Interaction Between Magic & Tech:
    Tech functions as containment; magic is volatile. Machines often require psychic stabilizers or fun
creator: abbey
